     the Fermi energy is    -0.4492 ev

!    total energy              =  -11738.33829259 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          3.3E-09 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.08727920 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =  -11738.25101338 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -247149.11765290 Ry
     hartree contribution      =  124673.18176824 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -4203.07731143 Ry
     ewald contribution        =  114943.81483118 Ry
     DFT-D3 Dispersion         =      -3.05264847 Ry

     total magnetization       =    42.02 Bohr mag/cell
     absolute magnetization    =    52.76 Bohr mag/cell

     convergence has been achieved in  36 iterations
